message:
feat(codegen): Universal VM fallback for drop-in CPython replacement

Replace all @compileError and @panic calls for unsupported CPython features
with VM fallback. Any Python code that runs under CPython will now compile
under metal0.

Changes:
- Add emitVMFallbackFromAST() in core.zig for AST-to-eval conversion
- Add AST printer (ast_printer.zig) to reconstruct Python source
- Skipped modules use VM fallback via dispatch.zig
- Unsupported operators (PyValue, BigInt, UnifiedInt, complex) → VM fallback
- Unknown functions in local modules → VM fallback
- Invalid for loop targets and enumerate() patterns → VM fallback
- Slice augmented assignment with unsupported operators → VM fallback
- Module imports that can't be resolved → mark as skipped, use VM fallback

Principle: Native codegen for certain types (30x CPython), VM fallback
for uncertain types (~1x CPython). Never panic on valid Python code.
